description: Dual-graph MCP tool for Claude Code and Codex CLI
notes:
Set your license key before installing:
  $env:DG_LICENSE_KEY="XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX"
  scoop install dual-graph

Then open a new terminal and run:
  dgc "C:\path\to\your\project"   # Claude Code
  dg  "C:\path\to\your\project"   # Codex CLI
